name: Iced Black Forest Mocha
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour espresso into a 12-ounce glass filled with ice.
2. Add syrups and cold milk.
3. Stir gently until combined.
4. Top with a generous dollop of whipped cream, shaved chocolate, and garnish with cherry.
Makes 1 serving.
Per serving: 294 calories, 17 grams fat (53 percent of total calories), 54 milligrams cholesterol, 9 grams protein, 28 grams carbohydrate, 143 milligrams sodium.
